name: ifl-ios-standards
description: Boardy+VIP iOS engineering standards for Claude Code. Ships 10 specialist subagents (orchestrator, planner, researcher, coder, tester, reviewer, review-triage, architect, doc-scribe, optimization), a QUICK_REF-driven router skill plus clustered task skills (new-module, new-board, io-interface, communication, service-layer, plugin-composition, testing, review, refactor, troubleshoot, adopt), the full architecture rulebook + specs as bundled reference, and Bazel module/board scaffolders (ifl-new-module / ifl-new-board) on PATH.
